title: pseudoconyza lyrata
intro: Pseudoconyza lyrata, also known as fleabane or horseweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Pseudoconyza lyrata include reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of Pseudoconyza lyrata can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
